title: What is photosynthesis and how does it work?
body: I keep reading that plants make their own food but I don't understand the actual process. What happens step by step inside a leaf? Is it the same in all plants?
author: u_bob

title: How do I solve quadratic equations?
body: I understand linear equations fine but quadratics confuse me. When should I use factoring vs the quadratic formula vs completing the square? Are there rules for choosing the method?
author: u_alice

title: Why did World War I start?
body: I know the assassination of Archduke Franz Ferdinand is usually mentioned but that seems too simple. Were there deeper causes? How did one assassination lead to a world war?
author: u_carol

title: What is the difference between RAM and ROM?
body: My teacher mentioned both but I still get confused about which one does what. Can someone explain with a simple real-world comparison?
author: u_alice

title: How can I improve my essay writing?
body: I always get marked down for 'lack of structure' and 'weak argument'. What are the most important things to fix when writing academic essays?
author: u_carol
